title: Untitled Discourses on Hate, Etc.
text:
## 13. Abbreviated Texts Beginning with Greed

“Of hate … delusion … anger … acrimony … disdain … contempt … jealousy … stinginess … deceitfulness … deviousness … obstinacy … aggression … conceit … arrogance … vanity … for insight into negligence … complete understanding … complete ending … giving up … ending … vanishing … fading away … cessation … giving away … letting go of negligence these six things should be developed.” That is what the Buddha said. Satisfied, the mendicants approved what the Buddha said. The Book of the Sixes is finished.
